title: Veep
subTitle: Selina Meyer, an ex-senator, becomes the Vice President of the United States. Subsequently, she navigates political chaos in a sharp, satirical journey through the corridors of power.

title: Veep
subTitle: The Veep's office is revived by good news that her task force is likely to be green lit. With the President out of the country, Selina looks to make headway on filibuster reform and meeting with some 'normal' people.

subTitle: Selina becomes obsessed with the unflattering nicknames given to her by bloggers, and after a snub, assigns Dan to get White House intel from Jonah.

subTitle: Selina attends a healthy-eating event at Camden Yards with some grumpy fast-food executives, where she also confides a secret to Amy.

subTitle: With the Veep and her staff taking flack over a pregnancy rumor and the firing of a Secret Service agent, Selina orders a full disclosure of all office correspondence and threatens to fire a staffer.

subTitle: A damaging story is leaked about Selina's former husband Andrew. Meanwhile, Danny Chung takes advantage of the shutdown.

subTitle: After being prepped for an interview at the VP residence, Selina is thrown by Janet's questions.

subTitle: Undeterred by a message that POTUS wants Selina to limit her public appearances, the Veep continues her plans. Meanwhile, Dan attempts to play both sides of the Selina vs Danny Chung rivalry.

subTitle: With the administration in full crisis mode, the entire staff goes on frenzied job hunt.

subTitle: During her book signing tour for her new autobiography 'Some New Beginnings,' Selina receives some interesting news. Meanwhile, Amy and Dan fight over a coveted promotion.

title: Veep
subTitle: Following POTUS' new stance on abortion, Selina is forced to reconsider hers. Meanwhile, Jonah starts a consulting firm outlet called Ryantology.

title: Veep
subTitle: While Selina and her staff prepare for an Annapolis event where she will announce her candidacy, Dan gets word that SNL has done a sketch on the Veep.

title: Veep
subTitle: On a fundraising trip in Silicon Valley, Selina is challenged by an anti-fracking mother and visits the campus of Clovis, a tech company with an ambitious young CEO.

title: Veep
subTitle: As Amy and Dan vie for position as Selina's campaign manager, Ben arranges a secret lunch for the Veep with hotshot strategist Bill Ericsson.

title: Veep
subTitle: At an economic summit in Detroit, Selina's staff and her family are peeved by the presence of her new personal trainer, Ray. Meanwhile, Jonah and Mike negotiate a photo-op with Selina and Maddox.

subTitle: Crossover episode with Armando Iannucci's previous political sitcom 'The Thick of It'.

subTitle: As the candidates of the party kick off their first debate, some prove more nefarious than their appearance, while other crack under the pressure.

subTitle: Three days before the New Hampshire primary, Selina and her staff juggle her multiple official obligations and campaign appearances.
